channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.119】Visual Studio 代码 1.119
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.119 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.119 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【Removing The Monkey Work of Migration】消除迁移的麻烦工作
item.description: 【Removing The Monkey Work of Migration; in this post we show how Git-Ape ana】消除迁移的猴子工作；在这篇文章中，我们展示了 Git-Ape 如何

item.title: 【Python support for the Microsoft Teams SDK is now generally available】Microsoft Teams SDK 的 Python 支持现已普遍可用
item.description: 【Today we’re announcing the general availability (GA) of Python support in the Microsoft Teams SDK. Python developers can now build Teams-native apps and agents using the same SDK surface that powers modern Teams experiences across our Type】今天，我们宣布 Microsoft Teams SDK 全面支持 Python（GA）。 Python 开发人员现在可以使用相同的 SDK 界面构建 Teams 原生应用和代理，为我们的类型提供现代 Teams 体验

item.title: 【Sponsor group type requirements for agent identities】代理身份的保荐人团体类型要求
item.description: 【As part of moving to general availability (GA) for Entra Agent ID, agent blueprints, agent blueprint principals, and agent identities only accept dynamic membership groups and Microsoft 365 groups】作为 Entra 代理 ID 全面可用性 (GA) 的一部分，代理蓝图、代理蓝图主体和代理身份仅接受动态成员资格组和 Microsoft 365 组

item.title: 【The new Run dialog: faster, cleaner, and more capable】新的“运行”对话框：更快、更干净、更强大
item.description: 【We've shipped the new Run dialog - and we want to say thanks. As the team behind Windows Terminal and PowerToys, we're excited to bring this to Windows 11, and your feedback helped shape it!】我们已经发布了新的“运行”对话框 - 我们想说声谢谢。作为 Windows Terminal 和 PowerToys 背后的团队，我们很高兴将其引入 Windows 11，您的反馈帮助塑造了它！

item.title: 【Introducing langchain-azure-cosmosdb: Build Agentic Apps and RAG with One Database】langchain-azure-cosmosdb 简介：使用一个数据库构建代理应用程序和 RAG
item.description: 【Build AI Agents and RAG Applications with the New LangChain + LangGraph Connector for Azure Cosmos DB Building AI agents and RAG applications today means stitching together half a dozen services, a vector database, a chat history store, a checkpointer for agent state, a semantic cache, a long-term memory layer. Each adds operational】使用适用于 Azure Cosmos DB 的新 LangChain + LangGraph 连接器构建 AI 代理和 RAG 应用程序 如今构建 AI 代理和 RAG 应用程序意味着将六个服务、一个矢量数据库、一个聊天历史存储、一个代理状态检查点、一个语义缓存、一个长期内存层拼接在一起。每个都增加了可操作的

item.title: 【Developing a cross-process reader/writer lock with limited readers, part 4: Abandonment】开发具有有限读取器的跨进程读取器/写入器锁，第 4 部分：放弃
item.description: 【We've been building a cross-process reader/writer lock with a cap on the number of readers, we concluded our investigation last time by noting that there is a serious proble】我们一直在构建一个跨进程的读取器/写入器锁，并对读取器的数量进行限制，我们上次的调查结束时指出存在一个严重的问题

item.title: 【Azure Developer CLI (azd) - April 2026】Azure 开发人员 CLI (azd) - 2026 年 4 月
item.description: 【The Azure Developer CLI (azd) shipped five releases in April 2026. The biggest theme this month is multi-language hook support: write azd hooks in Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, or .NET alongside the existing Bash and PowerShell options. Here's what's in versions】Azure 开发人员 CLI (azd) 于 2026 年 4 月发布了五个版本。本月最大的主题是多语言挂钩支持：使用 Python、JavaScript、TypeScript 或 .NET 以及现有的 Bash 和 PowerShell 选项编写 azd 挂钩。这是版本中的内容

item.title: 【Dataverse Plugin Is Now on the Claude Marketplace】Dataverse 插件现已登陆 Claude Marketplace
item.description: 【Dataverse gives developers a powerful platform for building enterprise applications — but getting from zero to a connected, working environment has always involved multiple tools, authentication flows, and configuration steps. The Dataverse plugin was built to accelerate that journey by letting AI coding agents handle the setup orchestrat】Dataverse 为开发人员提供了一个用于构建企业应用程序的强大平台，但从零到互联的工作环境始终涉及多种工具、身份验证流程和配置步骤。 Dataverse 插件的构建是为了通过让 AI 编码代理处理设置编排来加速这一过程
